title: Cat Scratching Mat - Sisal Cat Scratcher for Wall, Floor or Sofa - 60x40cm Scratch Board - Anti-Slip, Easy to Mount, Shedding-Resistant - Aesthetic Design - Indoor Cats - Chat Noir
features: Keep Your Sofa Looking New - The Sisal Cat Scratching Post Mat board is a versatile cat toy designed for indoor cats, offering a 3-in-functionality that can be used as a cat scratching post, cat wall furniture, or a cat play mat.

Made from 100% high-quality natural sisal: built to withstand the wear and tear of extensive use, this cat scratching board features a shedding-resistant surface, making it an ideal scratch pad for cats, ensuring durability and longevity for your feline friends scratching needs.
Equipped with hook and loop tape, this cat scratcher can be easily attached to walls, sofas, or carpets, serving as an effective anti-scratch furniture protector and wall protector.
The anti-slip design of this cat scratching mat ensures stability during playtime, making it a reliable choice for cat toys for indoor cats adult, preventing unwanted movement.

A Great Size - Measuring 60cm x 40cm, it is the perfect size for even the largest of breeds to stretch, scratch their claws and relax on. The arty design looks great in any setting, and can be rolled and stored away if necessary.
The stylish design of this cat wall scratcher doubles as wall art, seamlessly blending into your home decor while serving as a functional scratching post for indoor cats.
description: Product description Introducing the Sisal Cat Scratching Post Mat Board 3-in-Cat Toy, a revolutionary addition to your felines playtime and home environment. Designed with the modern cat and cat owner in mind, this versatile cat scratching post is more than just a toy—its a multifunctional solution for your indoor cats scratching needs. Whether your cat loves to scratch the wall, sofa, or carpet, this innovative product offers a durable and shedding-resistant scratching surface that satisfies their natural instincts while protecting your furniture. With its sleek design and the elegant Chat Noir theme, it doubles as a piece of wall art, seamlessly blending into your home decor. Crafted from high-quality sisal, this cat scratching board is built to withstand even the most enthusiastic scratchers. The anti-slip backing ensures it stays in place, providing a stable surface for your cat to enjoy. The included hook and loop tape allows for easy installation on walls, sofas, or carpets, making it a versatile addition to any room. This cat scratcher is not just a toy; its a comprehensive cat wall furniture solution that serves as an anti-scratch furniture protector and a wall protector, ensuring your home remains pristine while your cat stays entertained. Perfect for adult indoor cats, the Sisal Cat Scratching Post Mat Board is an essential cat accessory that promotes healthy scratching habits. It acts as a scratch pad for cats, a cat carpet protector, and a cat wall scratcher all in one. Say goodbye to the days of your cat scratching the carpet or furniture, and hello to a happier, more content feline friend. Invest in this scratch post for cats today and transform your home into a cat-friendly haven with the ultimate scratching posts for indoor cats. Directions Use on floor or attach to wall for cat to scratch
